Title: Mitigating Proxy-to-Wild Domain Gap in Deepfake Speech
Author: Xuanjun Chen, Yun-Shing Wu, Wei-Chung Lu, Claire Lin, Haibin Wu, Hung-yi Lee, Jyh-Shing Roger Jang
Description: Proposes Domain-Shift Feature Augmentation (DSFA), which turns deterministic feature statistics into stochastic distributions during fine-tuning to simulate in-the-wild variation and improve the generalization of codec-based deepfake speech countermeasures. Also introduces CoSG ExtEval, a more challenging evaluation set covering 40 unseen generative models and long-form audio.
